revision.comment: Usually given in the article, and not by the target of the redirect itself.
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from misquotation
  |name=From a misquotation
  |from=a misquotation or a [[mondegreen]]
  |info=The correct form is {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|<bdi>'''{{{1|{{{of}}}}}}'''</bdi>|given by or in the target of the redirect}}.
** This redirect is made available to aid [[H:S|searches]].  Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the target without the use of a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] that hides the correct details.  
** This template tags redirects with a subcategory of the {{c|Redirects from incorrect names}} category, so template {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should not be used with this template.
  |all category=Redirects from misquotations
}}<includeonly>{{Main other
|{{{Category|[[Category:{{#ifexpr: {{#ifeq: {{{2}}}    | printworthy | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{printworthy}}}  | yes | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{unprintworthy}}} | no | 1 | 0 }}
                |Printworthy
                |Unprintworthy
        }} redirects]]}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from misquotation
  |name=From a misquotation
  |from=a misquotation or a [[mondegreen]]
  |info=The correct form is {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|<bdi>'''{{{1|{{{of}}}}}}'''</bdi>|given by or in the target of the redirect}}.
** This redirect is made available to aid [[H:S|searches]].  Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the target without the use of a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] that hides the correct details.  
** This template tags redirects with a subcategory of the {{c|Redirects from incorrect names}} category, so template {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should not be used with this template.
  |all category=Redirects from misquotations
}}<includeonly>{{Main other
|{{{Category|[[Category:{{#ifexpr: {{#ifeq: {{{2}}}    | printworthy | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{printworthy}}}  | yes | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{unprintworthy}}} | no | 1 | 0 }}
                |Printworthy
                |Unprintworthy
        }} redirects]]}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from misquotation
  |name=From a misquotation
  |from=a misquotation or a [[mondegreen]]
  |info=The correct form is {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|<bdi>'''{{{1|{{{of}}}}}}'''</bdi>|given by or in the target of the redirect}}.

** This template tags redirects with a subcategory of the {{c|Redirects from incorrect names}} category, so template {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should not be used with this template.
  |all category=Redirects from misquotations
}}<includeonly>{{Main other
|{{{Category|[[Category:{#ifexpr: {{#ifeq: {{{2}}}    | printworthy | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{printworthy}}}  | yes | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{unprintworthy}}} | no | 1 | 0 }}
                |Printworthy

        }} redirects]]}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

  |id=R from misquotation

  |from=a misquotation or a [[mondegreen]]
  |info=The correct form is {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|<bdi>'''{{{1|{{{of}}}}}}'''</bdi>|given by or in the target of the redirect}}.

** This template tags redirects with a subcategory of the {{c|Redirects from incorrect names}} category, so template {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should not be used with this template.

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from misquotation
  |name=From a misquotation
  |from=a misquotation or a [[mondegreen]]
  |info=The correct form is {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|<bdi>'''{{{1|{{{of}}}}}}'''</bdi>|given by or in the target of the redirect}}.
** This redirect is made available to aid [[:en:H:S|searches]].  Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the target without the use of a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] that hides the correct details.  
** This template tags redirects with a subcategory of the {{c|Redirects from incorrect names}} category, so template {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should not be used with this template.
  |all category=Redirects from misquotations
}}<includeonly>{{Main other
|{{{Category|[[Category:#ifexpr: {{#ifeq: {{{2}}}    | printworthy | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{printworthy}}}  | yes | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{unprintworthy}}} | no | 1 | 0 }}
                |Printworthy
                |Unprintworthy
        }} redirects]]}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.text:

</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from misquotation
  |name=From a misquotation
  |from=a misquotation or a [[:en:mondegreen|mondegreen]]
  |info=The correct form is {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|<bdi>'''{{{1|{{{of}}}}}}'''</bdi>|given by or in the target of the redirect}}.
** This redirect is made available to aid [[:en:H:S|searches]].  Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the target without the use of a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] that hides the correct details.  
** This template tags redirects with a subcategory of the {{c|Redirects from incorrect names}} category, so template {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should not be used with this template.
  |all category=Redirects from misquotations
}}<includeonly>{{Main other
|{{{Category|[[Category:#ifexpr: {{#ifeq: {{{2}}}    | printworthy | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{printworthy}}}  | yes | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{unprintworthy}}} | no | 1 | 0 }}
                |Printworthy
                |Unprintworthy
        }} redirects]]}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from misquotation
  |name=From a misquotation
  |from=a misquotation or a [[:en:mondegreen|mondegreen]]
  |info=The correct form is {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|<bdi>'''{{{1|{{{of}}}}}}'''</bdi>|given by or in the target of the redirect}}.
** This redirect is made available to aid [[:en:H:S|searches]].  Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the target without the use of a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] that hides the correct details.  
** This template tags redirects with a subcategory of the {{c|Redirects from incorrect names}} category, so template {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should not be used with this template.
  |all category=Redirects from misquotations
}}<includeonly>{{Main other
|{{{Category|[[Category:#ifexpr: {{#ifeq: {{{2}}}    | printworthy | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{printworthy}}}  | yes | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{unprintworthy}}} | no | 1 | 0 }}
                |Printworthy
                |Unprintworthy
        }} redirects]]}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from misquotation
  |name=From a misquotation
  |from=a misquotation or a [[:en:mondegreen|mondegreen]]
  |info=The correct form is {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|<bdi>'''{{{1|{{{of}}}}}}'''</bdi>|given by or in the target of the redirect}}.
** This redirect is made available to aid [[:en:H:S|searches]].  Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the target without the use of a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] that hides the correct details.  
** This template tags redirects with a subcategory of the {{c|Redirects from incorrect names}} category, so template {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should not be used with this template.
  |all category=Redirects from misquotations
}}<includeonly>{{Main other
|{{{Category|[[Category:#ifexpr: {{#ifeq: {{{2}}}    | printworthy | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{printworthy}}}  | yes | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{unprintworthy}}} | no | 1 | 0 }}
                |Printworthy
                |Unprintworthy
        }} redirects]]}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from misquotation
  |name=From a misquotation
  |from=a misquotation or a [[:en:mondegreen|mondegreen]]
  |info=The correct form is {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|<bdi>'''{{{1|{{{of}}}}}}'''</bdi>|given by or in the target of the redirect}}.
** This redirect is made available to aid [[:en:H:S|searches]].  Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the target without the use of a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] that hides the correct details.  
** This template tags redirects with a subcategory of the {{c|Redirects from incorrect names}} category, so template {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should not be used with this template.
  |all category=Redirects from misquotations
}}<includeonly>{{Main other
|{{{Category|[[Category:#ifexpr: {{#ifeq: {{{2}}}    | printworthy | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{printworthy}}}  | yes | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{unprintworthy}}} | no | 1 | 0 }}
                |Printworthy
                |Unprintworthy
        }} redirects]]}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from misquotation
  |name=From a misquotation
  |from=a misquotation or a [[:en:mondegreen|mondegreen]]
  |info=The correct form is {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|<bdi>'''{{{1|{{{of}}}}}}'''</bdi>|given by or in the target of the redirect}}.
** This redirect is made available to aid [[:en:H:S|searches]].  Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the target without the use of a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] that hides the correct details.  
** This template tags redirects with a subcategory of the {{c|Redirects from incorrect names}} category, so template {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should not be used with this template.
  |all category=Redirects from misquotations
}}<includeonly>{{Main other
|{{{Category|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
</noinclude>
<noinclude>
[[Category:#ifexpr: {{#ifeq: {{{2}}}    | printworthy | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{printworthy}}}  | yes | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{unprintworthy}}} | no | 1 | 0 }}
                |Printworthy
                |Unprintworthy
        }} redirects]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from misquotation
  |name=From a misquotation
  |from=a misquotation or a [[:en:mondegreen|mondegreen]]

** This template tags redirects with a subcategory of the {{c|Redirects from incorrect names}} category, so template {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should not be used with this template.
  |all category=Redirects from misquotations
}}<includeonly>{{Main other
|{{{Category|}}}

                                or {{#ifeq: {{{printworthy}}}  | yes | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{unprintworthy}}} | no | 1 | 0 }}

        }} redirects]]

</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24957526818|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from misquotation
  |name=From a misquotation
  |from=a misquotation or a [[:en:mondegreen|mondegreen]]
  |info=The correct form is {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|<bdi>'''{{{1|{{{of}}}}}}'''</bdi>|given by or in the target of the redirect}}.
** This redirect is made available to aid [[:en:H:S|searches]].  Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the target without the use of a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] that hides the correct details.  
** This template tags redirects with a subcategory of the {{c|Redirects from incorrect names}} category, so template {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should not be used with this template.
  |all category=Redirects from misquotations
}}<includeonly>{{Main other
|{{{Category|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>

{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

[[Category:#ifexpr: {{#ifeq: {{{2}}}    | printworthy | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{printworthy}}}  | yes | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{unprintworthy}}} | no | 1 | 0 }}
                |Printworthy
                |Unprintworthy
        }} redirects]]
[[Category:Templates]]

</noinclude>
